name: Service Warranty
text: The Service Provider warrants that the Services and all Deliverables shall be performed with reasonable skill, care, and diligence, and shall materially conform to the requirements, specifications, and acceptance standards recorded in this Agreement. During the agreed warranty period, the Service Provider shall promptly correct, re-perform, or replace any non-conforming Services or Deliverables at no additional cost to the Client.

legal_basis.note: Compensation for loss caused by breach

invalid_if: Warranty obligation is too vague to identify the corrective obligation
Warranty period is inconsistent with the agreed commercial acceptance structure
title: Service Warranty
dispute_hotspots: Whether the service output actually failed the agreed standard
Whether re-performance is the exclusive remedy or one of multiple remedies
